channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Weekly)

item.title: 📝 rohanarun/phoneclaw (219 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: rohanarun

📝 Repository: rohanarun/phoneclaw

📄 Descrizione: A version of openClaw/Clawdbot that automates android phones entirely without root, including all apps from a side-loaded APK. Acts as your 24/7 personal assistant on your phone.

🍴 Forks: 35

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: 📝 Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android (28 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Natfii

📝 Repository: Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android

📄 Descrizione: Run AI agents 24/7 on your Android phone. Native Rust core, 25+ providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, Ollama), encrypted key storage, plugin browser, Material You UI. Self-hosted alternative to Mac Mini setups. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 28

🍴 Forks: 7

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agent-framework android anthropic deepseek encrypted-storage gemini grok iot jetpack-compose kotlin llm material-you mqtt ollama openai openclaw rust self-hosted zeroclaw

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T01:20:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-22T03:48:39Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: fzer0x

📝 Repository: fzer0x/SentryRadio

📄 Descrizione: A professional Android forensic tool designed to detect, analyze, and map cellular network anomalies, including potential IMSI Catchers (Stingrays), cell site simulators, and suspicious network downgrades and Silent SMS.

item.description:
👤 Owner: jhartshorn

📝 Repository: jhartshorn/SaveSwitcher

📄 Descrizione: SaveSwitcher is an Android app for managing per-user emulator saves by swapping the active save file for a game. Designed to work on small screens e.g. the secondary screen on the Ayn Thor.
